sections.paragraph:
(from the root יָשַׁב) plur. constr. מֹושְׁבֵי and מֹושְׁבֹות m.-

(1) a seat, place for sitting, 1Sa 20:18, 25 1Sa 20:25 Job 29:7.

(2) a sitting down, an assembly of persons, Psa 1:1 107:32 .

(3) habitation, Gen 27:39. בֵּית מֹושָׁב dwelling-place, Lev 25:29. עִיר מֹושָׁב a city of habitation, Psa 107:4, Psa 107:7. Meton.-(a) time of inhabiting, Exo 12:40.-(b) inhabitants, dwellers. 2Sa 9:12, כֹּל מֹושַׁב בֵּית צִיבָא.

(4) the site (of a city), 2Ki 2:19.
